metrics.name: registry_relay_http_requests_total
metrics.meaning: Completed HTTP requests grouped by bounded request attributes.

labels.endpoint_kind: Bounded route family, never a raw request path.
labels.error_code: Released machine error code, or none for a successful response.

metrics.name: registry_relay_http_request_duration_seconds
metrics.meaning: HTTP request duration in seconds grouped by bounded request attributes.

labels.endpoint_kind: Bounded route family, never a raw request path.
labels.error_code: Released machine error code, or none for a successful response.

metrics.name: registry_relay_readiness_ready_resources
metrics.meaning: Number of configured resources that are ready.

metrics.name: registry_relay_readiness_not_ready_resources
metrics.meaning: Number of configured resources that are not ready.

metrics.name: registry_relay_readiness_failed_resources
metrics.meaning: Number of configured resources whose latest ingest failed.

metrics.name: registry_relay_readiness_unresolved_entities
metrics.meaning: Number of configured entities without a resolved backing resource.

metrics.name: registry_relay_readiness_fully_ready
metrics.meaning: Whether every resource is ready and every entity is resolved, represented as zero or one.

metrics.name: registry_relay_ingest_consecutive_refresh_failures
metrics.meaning: Consecutive failed refresh attempts for a ready resource since its last successful data load or unchanged metadata poll.

labels.dataset_id: Configured dataset identifier; cardinality is bounded by configured resources.
labels.resource_id: Configured resource identifier; cardinality is bounded by configured resources.

metrics.name: registry_relay_ingest_last_successful_refresh_timestamp_seconds
metrics.meaning: Unix timestamp of the last successful data load for a ready resource.

labels.dataset_id: Configured dataset identifier; cardinality is bounded by configured resources.
labels.resource_id: Configured resource identifier; cardinality is bounded by configured resources.

metrics.name: registry_notary_http_requests_total
metrics.meaning: Completed HTTP requests grouped by bounded request attributes.

labels.endpoint_kind: Bounded route family, never a raw request path.
labels.error_code: Released machine error code, or none for a successful response.

metrics.name: registry_notary_http_request_duration_seconds
metrics.meaning: HTTP request duration in seconds grouped by bounded request attributes.

labels.endpoint_kind: Bounded route family, never a raw request path.
labels.error_code: Released machine error code, or none for a successful response.

metrics.name: registry_notary_audit_events_total
metrics.meaning: Audit write attempts grouped by bounded outcome.

metrics.name: registry_notary_replay_events_total
metrics.meaning: Replay-store decisions grouped by protocol flow and bounded outcome.

metrics.name: registry_notary_credential_issuance_total
metrics.meaning: Credential issuance attempts grouped by protocol and bounded outcome.

metrics.name: registry_notary_cel_evaluations_total
metrics.meaning: CEL worker evaluations grouped by bounded outcome.

metrics.name: registry_notary_cel_evaluation_duration_ms_total
metrics.meaning: Accumulated CEL evaluation duration in milliseconds grouped by bounded outcome.
